name: Max Verstappen
bio: Max Verstappen is a Dutch racing driver competing in Formula 1 for Red Bull Racing. He has won four World Drivers' Championships and is known for his aggressive driving style and multiple record-breaking performances.

name: Isack Hadjar
bio: Isack Hadjar is a French racing driver who joined Red Bull Racing for the 2025 season. He previously competed in Formula 2 and is known for his strong performances in junior categories.

name: Charles Leclerc
bio: Charles Leclerc is a Monégasque racing driver competing for Ferrari in Formula 1. Known for his exceptional qualifying performances, he has been with Ferrari since 2019 and is considered one of the most talented drivers of his generation.

name: Lewis Hamilton
bio: Sir Lewis Hamilton is a British racing driver who competes in Formula 1 for Ferrari. He is a eight-time World Champion, widely regarded as the greatest driver in the history of the sport, and a strong advocate for diversity and environmental causes.

name: George Russell
bio: George Russell is a British racing driver competing for Mercedes in Formula 1. He made his F1 debut with Williams in 2019 and joined Mercedes in 2022, bringing fresh energy and strong performances to the team.

name: Kimi Antonelli
bio: Kimi Antonelli is an Italian racing driver who joined Mercedes for the 2025 season. He is the nephew of former F1 champion Kimi Räikkönen and has shown promising performances in junior formulas.

name: Lando Norris
bio: Lando Norris is a British racing driver competing for McLaren in Formula 1. Known for his entertaining driving style and strong performances, he has been with McLaren since his F1 debut in 2019 and is widely popular among fans.

name: Oscar Piastri
bio: Oscar Piastri is an Australian racing driver competing for McLaren in Formula 1. He made his F1 debut in 2023 and quickly established himself as a consistent performer with strong race craft.

name: Fernando Alonso
bio: Fernando Alonso is a Spanish racing driver competing for Aston Martin in Formula 1. A two-time World Champion, he is one of the most experienced drivers in F1 history and known for his technical expertise and versatility.

name: Lance Stroll
bio: Lance Stroll is a Canadian racing driver competing for Aston Martin in Formula 1. He joined Williams in 2017 and moved to Aston Martin (formerly Racing Point) in 2021, bringing significant investment to the team.

name: Pierre Gasly
bio: Pierre Gasly is a French racing driver competing for Alpine in Formula 1. He won his first F1 race at Monza in 2020 and has shown consistent performances throughout his career.

name: Franco Colapinto
bio: Franco Colapinto is an Argentine racing driver who joined Alpine for the 2024 season. He impressed in his debut race at Monza, scoring points on his first F1 appearance.

name: Esteban Ocon
bio: Esteban Ocon is a French racing driver competing for Haas in Formula 1. He has shown strong performances throughout his career and won his first F1 race at the 2024 Hungarian Grand Prix.

name: Oliver Bearman
bio: Oliver Bearman is a British racing driver who made his F1 debut with Haas in 2024. He impressed with his performances in Formula 2 and stepped up to F1 following strong showings in testing.

name: Alex Albon
bio: Alex Albon is a Thai-British racing driver competing for Williams in Formula 1. He made his F1 debut in 2019 with Toro Rosso and has shown consistent performances throughout his career.

name: Carlos Sainz
bio: Carlos Sainz Jr. is a Spanish racing driver competing for Williams in Formula 1. He won his first F1 race at the 2024 Australian Grand Prix and is known for his smooth driving style and strong performances.

name: Nico Hülkenberg
bio: Nico Hülkenberg is a German racing driver competing for Audi in Formula 1. Known for his technical expertise and testing experience, he returns to F1 after several years away from the sport.

name: Gabriel Bortoleto
bio: Gabriel Bortoleto is a Brazilian racing driver who joined Audi for the 2024 season. He impressed in Formula 2 and made his F1 debut with strong performances in testing.

name: Liam Lawson
bio: Liam Lawson is a New Zealand racing driver competing for Racing Bulls in Formula 1. He made his F1 debut in 2020 and has shown consistent performances in various F1 teams.

name: Arvid Lindblad
bio: Arvid Lindblad is a Swedish racing driver who joined Racing Bulls for the 2025 season. He is a rookie in F1 but has shown promising performances in junior categories.

name: Sergio Pérez
bio: Sergio Pérez is a Mexican racing driver competing for Cadillac in Formula 1. Known as 'Checo', he has won six Grands Prix and is known for his strong performances, especially in challenging conditions.

name: Valtteri Bottas
bio: Valtteri Bottas is a Finnish racing driver competing for Cadillac in Formula 1. He has won ten Grands Prix and spent several successful years with Mercedes before joining Cadillac.
